emails.subject: Cargill NDA
emails.body: Cargill NDA Tana, could you please get and NDA going for Cargill. Information as follows: Cargill Inc. 15407 McGinty Rd West Wausata, Mn 55391-2399 This needs to be a two way: Regarding sharing of information for a possible software sale. Should you have any questions please don't hesitate to give me a call at 30559. Thank you.
